opinion.h4: MacNEIL v. MORTON ET AL., JUSTICES OF THE SUPERIOR COURT. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME JUDICIAL COURT OF MASSACHUSETTS. No. 432. Decided December 7, 1959.
opinion.p: Edward J. McCormack, Jr., Attorney General of Massachusetts, and Richard H. Gens and William F. Long, Jr., Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
361 U.S. 128 VERNON v. BENNETT, WARDEN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF IOWA. No. 397, Misc. Decided December 7, 1959.
Norman A. Erbe, Attorney General of Iowa, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
